_meta.description: Aiko router test suite — complex prompts for binary agentic routing plus chat websearch

prompts.prompt: research how to bake a carrot cake, compare two credible recipes, plan ingredients with amounts, write steps and notes, and save a short report
schedule a job to check my email every hour and notify me when abc company sends me an email, then write a summary of the scheduled task
open think.py, agentic.py, and persona/router_prompts.json; combine architecture routing into coding; update util/test_route.py and report what changed
look up the newest llama.cpp release notes, fetch the relevant page, summarize important changes, and recommend whether I should update
inspect the repository for schedule_job usage, make a plan for adding weekly custom weekdays, patch the code if needed, and update tests
compare sqlite-vec and qdrant for Aiko memory using current docs, decide which fits local Jetson constraints, and write the recommendation
continue the routing refactor we were doing, check current git diff first, finish the missing tests, and tell me exactly what remains
draft a professional email to my landlord about the broken heater, include a calm deadline, and save it as a note
research whether onnxruntime has aarch64 CUDA wheels now, fetch sources, list evidence, then write a concise answer
debug why the memory write loop silently swallows exceptions, inspect the code path, implement a fix, and add a regression test
make a roadmap for getting GRACE walking in 3 months, include milestones, risks, weekly checkpoints, and a final checklist
set a reminder for tomorrow at 9am to submit the invoice and confirm what you scheduled
what do you think about combining architecture and coding as one route category
help me understand why binary routing is easier to test than many exclusive task labels
is it weird that I enjoy debugging router thresholds more than building features
explain from memory how cosine similarity can make nearby route examples ambiguous
talk me through whether planning should be a first step in agentic work or just a tool the agent chooses
what's the current stable Python version
what's the Canucks score from last night
has NVIDIA released any new Jetson hardware this year
what is ethereum trading at right now
did Modal change their pricing model recently
